content: Dexie official docs define Collection.modify(changes) for every object in a Collection; object or callback changes are supported, the Promise resolves to the modified count, and uncaught failure aborts the transaction. Local dexie@4.4.4 types expose modify(changes: UpdateSpec<TInsertType>): PromiseExtended<number>; current reference save code manually reads and puts every matching row inside a transaction.
